description: Create a fabrication drawing for an L-shaped granite countertop in LibreCAD (units: mm). The drawing must include a 'STONE' layer (Color: Cyan) for the countertop profile and a 'CUTOUTS' layer (Color: Red) for appliance openings. The L-shaped profile should follow the coordinates (0,0) -> (3000,0) -> (3000,600) -> (600,600) -> (600,2400) -> (0,2400) -> close, with a 50mm radius fillet at the internal corner (600,600). Include an 800mm x 450mm sink cutout centered at (1500, 300) and a 500mm x 500mm cooktop cutout centered at (300, 1500) on the 'CUTOUTS' layer. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/countertop.dxf.
